name: init-spec
description: Generate a one-shot-ready SPEC.md under specs/YYMMDD-NN-slug/, move a spec folder to specs/-DONE or specs/-ARCHIVED, or configure per-project spec rules via an external rules file.

rulesFile.description: Path (relative to project root) to a project-specific spec-rules markdown file. When set and the file exists, init-spec reads it and folds its rules into every SPEC.md it authors. Empty = default behavior, no extra rules.
